# Loaded when sector: legal
# Data exfiltration channels, corporate espionage infrastructure, and
# adversarial document-harvesting domains
#

*.file-upload-anon.net
*.secure-drop-external.io
*.mega-share-private.com

*.competitor-intel-collect.com
*.insider-data-broker.net
